description: This is a Java class file defining the CorrectiveActionService class, which manages corrective actions within a defect management system. It provides methods to create, retrieve, update, delete, and list corrective actions, integrating with repositories and domain objects.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionService
classes.description: Service class providing CRUD operations and listing functionality for CorrectiveAction objects, including filtering by defect, status, or overdue status.

methods.name: getOrThrow
methods.description: Retrieves a CorrectiveAction by ID or throws a 404 error if not found.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Returns a paginated list of CorrectiveActions, filtered by defect ID, status, or overdue status.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates and associates a new CorrectiveAction with a defect and an optional assignee.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates an existing CorrectiveAction's details, defect association, and assignee.

methods.name: resolveAssignee
methods.description: Resolves a User entity for the given assignee ID, throwing an exception if not found.
